name: Mrs Fields' Black and Whites
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Semisweet chocolate bar (5 1/4 oz), coarsely chopped
1 cup White chocolate bar (5 1/4 oz), coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, soda, and salt. Mix well and set aside.
3. Blend sugars in a large bowl using an electric mixer on medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl.
5. Add eggs and vanilla extract, and beat at medium speed until smooth.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture and chopped chocolates (both semisweet and white) to the sugar mixture. Blend at low speed until just combined.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 23-25 minutes.
9. Transfer cookies to a cooling rack.
